name: Gingery-Maple Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine chicken and flour. Toss to coat well, shaking off excess flour.
2. In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of the oil over medium-high heat. Cook chicken in batches, about 5 minutes, turning frequently and adding more oil as needed, until golden.
3. Arrange chicken in a single layer in an 11 x 7-inch baking dish. In a small bowl, whisk together remaining ingredients (except green onions) and pour evenly over chicken.
4. Bake, uncovered, in a 325°F degree oven for 30 minutes.
5. Turn the chicken over; bake for 45 minutes or until the glaze has thickened.
6. Serve garnished with minced green onions.
